userdoc.notice: TEST-ONLY minimal vault that mirrors the production VaultCore user surface         (`mint`/`redeem` against a bridge asset 1:1) plus the strategy surface         (`mintForStrategy` / `burnForStrategy`) used by the V3 strategy.         Skips the rest of the real Vault surface area (assets registry, allocate,         redeem queue, rebase, etc.). Mock OToken is plain ERC-20 — no rebasing on         testnet; observe yield via mock wOETH share rate or `remoteStrategyBalance`.
